full_text:
Gong Chen 龔諶
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gong Chen (龔諶)was born in Ba. Welcomed Zhang Fei into his city. His two sons served Shu. Gong Chen was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom.
